[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101101101 6
1 0111000111 6
2 1010111011 7
3 1110101000 5
4 1111011011 8
5 0100110111 6
6 1111111100 8
7 1101111011 8

01 10 0111110011 7
12 21 0111111011 8
23 32 0111111111 9
34 43 1111111100 8 match 6
45 54 1011101111 8
56 65 1011101111 8
67 76 0011111110 7
70 07 0001111111 7

02 20 0111011011 7
13 31 0111110110 7
24 42 1111111111 a
35 53 1101111111 9
46 64 1011101100 6
57 75 1001111111 8
60 06 0011110111 7
